techniques.technique_details: Use of phishing emails to compromise the target system, typically containing malicious attachments or links.
Exploitation of vulnerabilities in public-facing applications and lack of software maintenance or patching as an entry vector.
The group employs a double extortion tactic, exfiltrating data automatically and/or via web services before encryption, threatening to leak the data if ransom is not paid.
techniques.technique_name: Automated Exfiltration; Exfiltration Over Web Service

techniques.technique_details: Core ransomware action where victim files are encrypted for extortion purposes.
